subject.title: Reference flow from requirement to runnable evidence

collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainer; metrics are evidence only
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: Req2run metrics are adoption-readiness signals and are not policy-gate block conditions.

sourceArtifacts.description: Reference-flow requirement input used as a local, redacted stand-in for a GitHub Issue.
Baseline plan contract connecting tasks, commands, and evidence requirements.
Runnable verification fixture observed by the report-only loop.
Deterministic replay and first runnable verification evidence.
Reviewable claim-to-evidence mapping for the fixture.
Optional summary evidence that can feed a PR assurance review surface.

time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.reviewerQuestion: How long did it take for a requirement to produce the first runnable verification artifact?
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.calculationMethod: Minutes between requirementAcceptedAt and the first passing runnable verification timestamp.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.interpretation: Lower values can indicate that the reference flow turns requirements into runnable evidence with less setup friction.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.limitation: Sensitive to queueing, task size, CI availability, and whether timestamps are synthetic, redacted, or live.

spec_task_evidence_coverage.reviewerQuestion: How many spec or plan tasks have at least one linked evidence artifact?
spec_task_evidence_coverage.calculationMethod: tasks with one or more evidenceRefs divided by all required tasks in the measurement fixture.
spec_task_evidence_coverage.interpretation: Higher coverage means more of the planned work is reviewable through evidence rather than prose alone.
spec_task_evidence_coverage.limitation: Coverage says evidence exists; it does not prove the evidence is sufficient, current, or correct.

deterministic_replay_pass_rate.reviewerQuestion: Can the same local inputs be replayed deterministically?
deterministic_replay_pass_rate.calculationMethod: passing deterministic replay attempts divided by all replay attempts in the fixture.
deterministic_replay_pass_rate.interpretation: Higher pass rate supports adoption readiness because reviewers can reproduce the reported flow locally.
deterministic_replay_pass_rate.limitation: Fixture replay is not a live external-agent benchmark and does not measure raw coding-agent quality.

manual_intervention_count.reviewerQuestion: How many human interventions were required before runnable evidence existed?
manual_intervention_count.calculationMethod: Count of manualInterventions recorded in the measurement fixture.
manual_intervention_count.interpretation: Lower counts can indicate a smoother path, while non-zero counts identify where onboarding or docs should improve.
manual_intervention_count.limitation: Manual intervention taxonomy must be stable before comparing teams or repositories.

evidence_review_completeness.reviewerQuestion: How complete is the review-ready evidence set for the requirement-to-run path?
evidence_review_completeness.calculationMethod: required evidence items marked present and reviewed divided by all required evidence items.
evidence_review_completeness.interpretation: Higher completeness means the PR review surface has fewer missing local artifacts to inspect.
evidence_review_completeness.limitation: Completeness does not replace human approval and must not be promoted to a blocking gate without policy work.

limitations: offline fixture mode: no GitHub API or live external agent API was called.
report-only adoption evidence: this document does not approve, merge, or replace human review.
agent-vendor comparison is out of scope; metrics evaluate ae-framework workflow effectiveness only.
summary: Report-only req2run metrics for reval3-reference-flow-offline-demo: first runnable verification 34 minutes, task evidence coverage 3/4, replay pass rate 2/2, manual interventions 1, evidence review completeness 4/5.
